query:
SELECT 
  'HOJE' as periodo,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'ligacao' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ligacoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'whatsapp' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as whatsapp
FROM lead_history lh
JOIN users u ON lh.corretorId = u.id
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%Leticia%' OR u.name LIKE '%Letícia%')
  AND DATE(lh.createdAt) = CURDATE()
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'TOTAL' as periodo,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'ligacao' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ligacoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'whatsapp' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as whatsapp
FROM lead_history lh
JOIN users u ON lh.corretorId = u.id
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%Leticia%' OR u.name LIKE '%Letícia%');
